name: britannicahome.com
message:
Furniture.

“Britannica Home Fashions, Inc. has been a leading force in the home textile industry for over 40 years. Headquartered in the heart of New York City's Garment District, BHF has offices and strategic partners throughout North America, South America, Asia, and Europe. Innovation, creativity, quality, and value are the hallmarks of the products we create for retailers and their customers.”
